findings.location: s3 — 共通プロトコルヘッダ table, CorrelationId row
findings.description: The knowledge file puts '同左' in the 受信時 column for 関連メッセージID (CorrelationId), implying the same values apply when receiving. However, the source does not categorize CorrelationId by 送信時/受信時 at all. The source only provides two cases: 応答電文 (要求電文のメッセージID) and 再送要求 (応答再送を要求する要求電文のメッセージID), without assigning them to send or receive directions. The 受信時: 同左 value has no basis in the source.
findings.source_evidence:
関連メッセージID(CorrelationId)
  電文が関連する電文のメッセージID
  :応答電文: 要求電文のメッセージID
  :再送要求: 応答再送を要求する要求電文のメッセージID
(No 送信時/受信時 breakdown provided in source)

findings.location: s1 — フォーマット定義ファイル implementation example
findings.description: The knowledge file captures the naming convention for format definition files but omits the actual file content examples shown in the source. The source provides code blocks for both ProjectInsertMessage_RECEIVE.fmt and ProjectInsertMessage_SEND.fmt showing concrete parameters: file-type ("Fixed"), text-encoding ("MS932"), record-length (2120 for receive, 130 for send), and record-separator ("\r\n"). These parameters are implementation-relevant details that an AI needs to answer questions about what a format file looks like.
findings.source_evidence:
ProjectInsertMessage_RECEIVE.fmt: file-type: "Fixed", text-encoding: "MS932", record-length: 2120, record-separator: "\r\n"
ProjectInsertMessage_SEND.fmt: file-type: "Fixed", text-encoding: "MS932", record-length: 130, record-separator: "\r\n"

findings.description: The framework class ResponseMessage is used in both overridden method return types (protected ResponseMessage onReceive(...) and protected ResponseMessage onError(...)) and is a key API type for this feature, but it is absent from the s1 hints array.
findings.source_evidence:
protected ResponseMessage onReceive(RequestMessage request, ExecutionContext context)
protected ResponseMessage onError(Throwable e, RequestMessage request, ExecutionContext context)
